text: Health insurance policy covers hospitalization expenses incurred due to illness or injury.
Coverage begins after successful payment of premium and policy activation.
A waiting period of 30 days applies for all new policies except accidents.
Pre-existing diseases are not covered for the first 2 years of the policy.
Daycare procedures that do not require 24-hour hospitalization are covered.
Outpatient consultations are not covered under this policy.
Surgery expenses are covered up to a maximum of ₹2,00,000.
Inpatient treatment costs including room rent and nursing are covered.
ICU charges are covered up to ₹5,000 per day.
Ambulance charges are reimbursed up to ₹2,000 per hospitalization.
Emergency hospitalization must be reported within 24 hours.
Pre-authorization is mandatory for planned hospital admissions.
Failure to obtain pre-authorization may result in claim rejection.
Claims exceeding ₹2,00,000 require manual verification and approval.
Cashless claims are processed only at network hospitals.
Cosmetic or aesthetic treatments are not covered.
Dental treatments are excluded unless due to accidental injury.
Mental health treatments are covered as per IRDAI guidelines.
Maternity expenses are covered after a waiting period of 9 months.
Newborn baby coverage starts after 90 days of birth.
Vaccination expenses are not covered under this policy.
Original medical bills and discharge summary must be submitted for reimbursement.
Incomplete documentation may lead to claim rejection.
Fraudulent claims will lead to policy termination.
Submitting false documents will result in blacklisting of the policyholder.
Motor insurance covers accidental damage to insured vehicles.
Damage caused due to natural disasters is covered.
Pre-existing vehicle damage is not covered under motor insurance.
Driving under the influence of alcohol voids the claim.
Third-party liability is covered up to ₹5,00,000.
Personal accident cover is provided to the driver.
Repair costs must be validated by authorized service centers.
Use of non-genuine spare parts may lead to claim rejection.
Theft claims must be reported to police within 24 hours.
Failure to submit FIR copy will result in rejection.
Claims involving intentional damage are not covered.
Wear and tear damage is excluded from coverage.
Policy renewal must be completed before expiry to maintain continuity benefits.
Grace period of 15 days is allowed for renewal.
Claims are settled within 7 working days after approval.
